---
name: 📚 Documentation
about: Report missing or unclear documentation
title: "[DOCS] "
labels: documentation
assignees: ""
---

## What needs to be documented?
A clear and concise description of what documentation is missing or unclear.

## Where should it be documented?
Specify where this documentation should appear (e.g., README, code comments, wiki, API docs).

## Current situation
Describe the current state of the documentation (if any exists).

## Proposed content
Provide a draft or outline of what the documentation should include.

## Additional context
Add any other context, code examples, or screenshots that would help create the documentation.
